# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-030](task-0097): Provider Stream Processing

## Purpose

Implement provider stream processing.

## Scope

- Stream format
- Processing logic
- Backpressure

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement processing
3. Add backpressure

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Processing works
3. Backpressure works
